# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  # If the database uses TLS directly (e.g., MySQL with SSL/TLS)
  # - number: 3306
  #   name: mysql-tls
  #   protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: db.example.com
        port:
          number: 3306
---
# Example for a second external API, maybe with a different port/protocol
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-service
spec:
  hosts:
  - service.thirdparty.com
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http-api
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-service
spec:
  hosts:
  - service.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: service.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 8080
